ol.li: Logical Sparse Representation: The OS allows files to have a larger logical i_size than the blocks physically allocated on disk.
Metadata Invariant: A block address of 0 in the inode block map (or missing extent in ext4) signifies a "hole".
Read Path Optimization: When bmap returns 0, the kernel bypasses the Block I/O layer entirely.
Memory Synthesis: The requested buffer is populated using a fast memset operation, significantly reducing Latency and Power consumption.
